text: R53 CNAME vs ALIAS (the problem) @ mossteamaniio (@) arancnc ¢ ALIAS records map a NAME to an AWS resource ¢ Can be used both for naked/apex and normal records * For non apex/naked - functions like CNAME * There is no charge for ALIAS requests pointing at AWS resources e For AWS Services - default to picking ALIAS ¢ Should be the same “Type” as what the record is pointing at * APl Gateway, CloudFront, Elastic Beanstalk, ELB, Global Accelerator & S3
